_skipFilesNote: Four patterns: exact basename ('foo.ts'), suffix wildcard ('*.test.ts'), single-segment dir ('convexAdapter/' = any file under any path segment named convexAdapter), multi-segment path substring ('slices/comments/' = preserves rr-side divergent slices intact during mega-bundle lifts). slice.json + slice.contract.ts have rr-specific schemas; *.test.* skips co-located unit tests. convexAdapter.tsx + convexAdapter/ skip the production Convex adapter (rr uses localStorage). slices/{comments,database-csv,database-json,code-block,equation}/ preserve rr's independently-developed standalone lifts (rr has rr-specific config.ts + richer barrels + props-driven onImport callbacks). These rr versions are deliberate divergences from open-silong; the mega-bundle consumer in rr uses rr's bundled versions, not open-silong's overwrites.

pathMap._note: rr already has its own shadcn primitives at components/ui/; reuse them, do not overwrite
